title: Fry Algerian Candied Orange Peel Stir-fry
description: A floral, crispy brunch-mood dish featuring candied orange peel, prepared in a jain-friendly manner.

ingredients.name: orange peel
ingredients.amount: 3 slices, soaked in water for 2 hours and partially dried

instructions: Heat a pan over medium heat. Add almonds and fennel seeds to the pan.
Once they start to toast, add sliced onions and ginger, stir fry for about 5 minutes until the onions turn translucent.
Add orange slices (candied) to the pan. Stir well and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the citrus flavors are infused into the dish.
